using the the fluorescein there reveals that the focal area of the leakage in the right eye is consistent with neurovascular age related macular degeneration now for the doctor's impression and plan it looks like the diagnostic test and the eye exams are consistent with the neovascular age related macular degeneration also called wet macular degeneration now neovascular age related macular degeneration has advanced to a stage that usually leads to more severe vision loss happening now neovascular age related macular degeneration happens when those abnormal blood vessels start to grow beneath the retina what happens is the abnormal blood vessels leak fluid and blood which is wides called wet macular degeneration and what happens is secondary to wet macular degeneration it creates a large blind spot in the center of matthew's visual field that's why it it kinda looks like matthew will see a black dot in the center of matthew's vision field now neovascular age related macular degeneration is the most common cause of severe vision loss now the good news is the doctor has a plan for matthew for neovascular age related macular degeneration now once a month the doctor wants to give matthew an injection of lucent now lucent is gon na be injected in the vitreous portion of the eye after the doctor numbs the eye so matthew is not gon na feel any pain and those injections yeah
